title: Implement Sprint Progress Visualization
description: Add sprint progress components to Kanban view: burndown chart, velocity metrics, completion percentage ring. Create Sprint entity in database with start_date, end_date, goal. Calculate burndown from ticket completion timestamps. Show velocity trend over last 5 sprints.
acceptance_criteria: Sprint selector dropdown in Kanban header
Burndown chart (line graph) shows ideal vs actual completion
Chart uses portal-green for actual, gray dashed for ideal line
Completion ring shows percentage with animated fill
Velocity panel shows story points completed per sprint
Trend indicator shows if velocity increasing/decreasing
Sprint goal displayed as text banner
Charts render using recharts or visx library
agent_output: Implemented SprintDashboard with progress bar, status breakdown, Morty status grid, QuickStatsBar, and burndown placeholder. Dashboard view added to navigation.
